case.setup: A cold boot stages the exact profile-bound Bank-5 preload, runtime overlays and library shelf, reaches the REPL without loading IDE, IDEX or M65D, then a physical warm reset preserves all three staged regions.
case.action: Boot through the valid-catalog fast path, reach the REPL, replace the product medium with an arbitrary valid non-product 1581 medium, then load IDE, IDEX and M65D and call one bound function from each library.
case.expected: The stager skips restaging, all three libraries load from the SHA-bound Attic shelf without reading their D81 entries, the standard composition remains callable, and invalid or absent shelf data falls back fail-closed to the proven D81 path.
case.oracle: Physical-reset receipt with before/after shelf SHA readback, stager trace proving no restage, exact library-container SHA bindings, post-swap load transcript and one callable observation per library.

integration: Replace and strengthen warm-reset-valid-catalog-fastpath in the live G6 matrix when the 1.1 wave-1 product set is promoted; do not rewrite the sealed 1.0.1 matrix.
